noc_command_center.title: NOC Command Center
noc_command_center.description: Executive command view for network state, lifecycle, maintenance, scheduled maintenance, alerts, and recommendations.

intelligent_alert_classification.description: Classifies alert severity based on device role and physical device type.

deployment_groups.name: DR-CLUSTER-01
deployment_groups.description: Primary disaster recovery deployment group for On Watch backup archives.

service_impact_drilldown.title: Service Impact Drill Down
service_impact_drilldown.description: Operator drilldown for impacted services, affected members, root cause, confidence, and recommended action.

infrastructure_links.link_type: Configured Direction with Verified Physical Evidence

dynamic_physical_topology.description: Topology is created only by inventory devices and user-saved infrastructure links. Infrastructure devices are filtered out of endpoint cards and placed only by Physical Topology links.

physical_root_cause_engine.description: Classifies failed physical links as root cause and downstream devices/services as impacted.

interface_monitoring_plan.description: Planned next phase: monitor device interfaces/ports and alert when monitored interfaces go down.

snmp_inventory.description: Routers and switches use live SNMP interface discovery as the source of truth. Cached data is fallback only when live SNMP is unavailable.

router_monitored_interfaces_legacy_note: Phase 15A.1 keeps this only for backward compatibility. Router interface source of truth is SNMP discovery, not this list.
